description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Semgrep that scans code for security issues. The workflow should trigger on push events to dev and release-* branches, on pull requests to dev, and on a scheduled basis every Tuesday at 05:19. Use an ubuntu-latest job with read permissions to repository contents and write permissions to security events. The job should check out the code, scan it using Semgrep with a configuration from semgrep.dev, and upload the SARIF results.
